name: The Golden Dragon
description: Experience the fiery flavors of Sichuan and the delicate dim sum of Canton, all under one golden roof.
hero_quote: Where ancient recipes meet modern flavors.
history_intro: From a small Chinatown kitchen to a celebrated dining destination, The Golden Dragon has been serving authentic Chinese cuisine for over two decades.

history.title: The Beginning
history.description: Chef Li Wei opened the first Golden Dragon with a vision of bringing authentic Sichuan flavors to the city.

history.title: Award Winning
history.description: Won the Golden Wok Award for Best Chinese Restaurant.

history.title: AI Innovation
history.description: Pioneered AI-powered ordering with our smart menu recommendations.

why_us.title: Authentic Sichuan
why_us.description: Real Sichuan peppercorns imported weekly from China.

why_us.title: Master Chefs
why_us.description: Our chefs trained in Hong Kong and Chengdu.

why_us.title: AI Smart Menu
why_us.description: Personalized recommendations based on your taste.

why_us.title: Dim Sum Daily
why_us.description: Fresh dim sum prepared every morning.

why_us.title: Made Fresh
why_us.description: No MSG, no preservatives — just real ingredients.

why_us.title: Live Kitchen
why_us.description: Watch our chefs work their magic.

ai_waiter.name: Dragon AI
ai_waiter.personality: Wise and knowledgeable about Chinese cuisine
ai_waiter.greeting: Ni Hao! Welcome to The Golden Dragon. Let me guide you through our menu.

reviews.name: Priya M.
reviews.text: The dim sum here is as good as what I had in Hong Kong!

reviews.name: Raj K.
reviews.text: Best Sichuan food in the city. The hot pot is incredible.

reviews.name: Sarah L.
reviews.text: Amazing flavors and great AI recommendations.

offers.title: Hot Pot Night
offers.description: 20% off on hot pot orders every Wednesday
